name: Sec Red NCD 8.66% Sr.II
summary: Sec Red NCD 8.66% Sr.II represents a secured, redeemable, non-convertible debenture issued by Shriram Transport Finance Limited, offering a fixed interest rate of 8.66% and belonging to Series II of the issuance; it is a debt instrument used by the company to raise capital from the public; Shriram Transport Finance Limited is an asset financing NBFC focused on providing financing solutions to commercial vehicle owners.
